# Liquid-memory shard (wire + mock)

Parent: [Gnosis README](../README.md)

This track treats a **shard** as a byte-addressable pool (BRAM/DDR on FPGA, `Vec<u8>` in the lab) with a **fixed 10-byte AeonFlow** header on every message so framing overhead stays bounded next to fat RPC stacks.

## Getting Started

- **What:** a lab shard for AeonFlow-framed memory operations and a UDP mock.
- **Why:** it gives the runtime team a small, inspectable place to test framed read/write behavior before wiring larger mesh pieces together.
- **How:** run `pnpm --dir open-source/gnosis run liquid-shard:smoke` from the repo root.
- **Next:** read the frame format and smoke-test sections before using it as a transport dependency.

## Where it lives

- **Wire layout (Rust, parity with TS):** [`rtl-bridge/src/aeon_flow_frame.rs`](../rtl-bridge/src/aeon_flow_frame.rs) — mirrors [`open-source/aeon/src/flow/FlowCodec.ts`](../../aeon/src/flow/FlowCodec.ts).
- **JSON command surface (v0):** [`rtl-bridge/src/liquid_memory_shard.rs`](../rtl-bridge/src/liquid_memory_shard.rs) — `ping`, `stats`, `read`, `write`; stream ids `0xF001` / `0xF002`.
- **UDP mock:** `cargo run --manifest-path rtl-bridge/Cargo.toml --bin gnosis-liquid-shard-mock` — one AeonFlow frame per datagram; env `GNOSIS_LIQUID_SHARD_PORT` (default `19747`), `GNOSIS_LIQUID_SHARD_BYTES` (default 1 MiB).
- **Mesh UDP co-host:** [`distributed-inference`](../distributed-inference/) `fat-station-flow-udp` accepts the same **`0xF001` / `0xF002`** stream IDs on its inference bind address (alongside `0x0001`–`0x0006`). Uses `GNOSIS_LIQUID_SHARD_BYTES` for the in-process pool (default 1 MiB). Wire details: [`docs/pneuma/mesh-flow-udp.md`](../../../docs/pneuma/mesh-flow-udp.md).
- **Host smoke:** `pnpm run liquid-shard:smoke` from this package — spawns the mock and exercises `FlowCodec` + UDP.

## Scale / FPGA alignment

See [`rtl-bridge/docs/SCALE_TILE_AXI.md`](../rtl-bridge/docs/SCALE_TILE_AXI.md) (goal 5: host–shard AeonFlow) and [`ROADMAP-FPGA.md`](../ROADMAP-FPGA.md).

## Mesh context

Liquid pools and layer-cache patterns are discussed alongside mesh runbooks in repo docs such as [`docs/MONSTER_MESH_70B_OPERATIONS.md`](../../../docs/MONSTER_MESH_70B_OPERATIONS.md) and the knotgraph layer-cache surface [`../../knotgraph/src/layer-cache/index.ts`](../../knotgraph/src/layer-cache/index.ts).
